title: Mushroom Quest
description: Forage mushrooms and live out your cottagecore fantasies!
body:
![Mushroom Quest!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2812184ed8da00518f835ee1fb1fb8e95509509c.png)
This mod's concept revolves around foraging for various real-world fungi while you set forth on an adventure to explore nature and live out your cottagecore fantasies. Hope you enjoy my first mod!

![Foraging](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5226ec61f9fc5640592480e8b91c8b05a1ce6897.png)

There are exactly **137** mushrooms you can forage for! Each mushroom is either common, rare or mythical rarity. All mushrooms are edible and most can give you either medicinal or deadly effects when eaten. Some mushrooms can also be used in crafting recipes, as fuel, or to brew potions! You can find these mushrooms by breaking various foraging blocks found across the world. 

- **Oak Stumps** are found in any biome populated by oak trees.
- **Birch Trunks** are found in any biome with birch trees.
- **Field Trunks**, and **Shrumps** are found in plains biomes and forests.
- **Acacia Stumps** are found in biomes containing acacia trees.
- **Jungle Trunks** are found in tropical jungle biomes.

The **Mycopedia** is a book that contains information about all the mushrooms! It includes the fungi's: Edibility, Location, Rarity, and Usage. (Currently this feature is a WIP)

![Funglings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d2945a1487733b86c8dec3b34a64d77e0d8f6be.png)

**Funglings** are small fungal creatures that take many different forms. All except for the Crimson and Warped variants can be found in the Mushroom Island biome. These creatures can be tamed with dead bushes, or crimson/warped roots for the nether variants. Tamed Funglings can be told to stay or follow by shift + right-clicking on them. These little pets are purely cosmetic, they do not provide any sort of support or abilities just yet.

![All Fungling variants!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ec18c4815d082391d9ee270f9090098fb41be8e_0.webp)

![Mushroom Caps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fee4a38c333639598b14163cfcdfc6cdd3e8835.png)

The **Mushroom Cap** is an aesthetic helmet the player can find with a 100% chance in the **Witch's Cottage** structure! These caps will start out "Blank" when a player first finds them, but they can then be dyed into any of 9 different color varieties!

The **Sporestep** enchantment is a new enchant that can only be applied to Mushroom Caps! This enchant grants the player a speed and jump boost, as well as slow falling when they are standing on mushroom-related blocks.
![All Mushroom Caps!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcfb1984ea3b81ed634a0c80ba7213a02760b465.png)

All the information listed above applies to the latest version of the mod, most of this information won't apply to older versions. I also will not be backporting this mod to any older versions.

If you want to see content updates or maybe support me, check out my [Linktree](https://linktr.ee/ryukusuu)
